concept.title: Local preprocessor options
concept.shortdesc: You can define and select which local preprocessor options to use to build local and remote COBOL and PL/I programs.

conbody.p: The Local Preprocessor page is available on the COBOL and PL/I property group tabs.

You use the Local Preprocessor page of the property group editor to specify information about local preprocessors to be started before the local COBOL or PL/I compiler. For more information about setting local preprocessor options, see the related links.
